name: Regularised UFNO — dropout + plateau LR + basin sampler
description: Added Dropout(0.3) to prediction head, unet_dropout=0.2, weight_decay increased to 1e-3, StepLR replaced with ReduceLROnPlateau(patience=10), and inverse-frequency WeightedRandomSampler to oversample EP.
observations: Regularisation significantly reduced EP RMSE (1.669 → 0.131 at 24h). Train/val gap narrowed. Best val at epoch 5 — model still learns quickly and plateaus. Val loss flatlines ~0.93 for remaining 145 epochs suggesting model capacity or data size is now the bottleneck, not regularisation.
